title: Update year to 2026 in HeroSection stats

requirements.summary: Update the founding year stat in HeroSection from its current value to '2026'
acceptanceCriteria: The stat element identified by the given XPath in the HeroSection displays '2026'.
All other stat elements and content in the HeroSection remain unchanged.
The dark overlay and all text content remain fully readable on top of the hero background.

file_operations.description: Locate the stat element that displays the founding year (currently at the third stat position in the stats grid) and update its text content to display '2026'. Preserve all other stats (players count, tournaments count) and maintain the existing styling, dark overlay, and hero background configuration.
